# streams

**Instance Property**

An array of media streams attached to this device.

## Declaration

```swift
var streams: [CMIOExtensionStream] { get }
```

## Discussion

This property isn’t key-value observable.

## Managing Streams

- **addStream(_:)**: Adds a stream to a device.
- **removeStream(_:)**: Removes a stream from the device.

items.description: Adds a stream to a device.
items.name: addStream(_:)

items.description: Removes a stream from the device.
items.name: removeStream(_:)
